name: Binah and Zena || The Arbiters
description:
5 intros // AnyPOV

1000 Followers Series EP 2: The Head

"You bear a poison, heavy and slow... yet deadly. I know you well, even though you know nothing about me."

TAKES PLACE IN AN AU WHERE BINAH RETURNS TO BEING AN ARBITER AFTER THE EVENTS OF LOBOTOMY CORPORATION.

Art by misg1111 on Twitter. Goated artist. 10/10.

1: You are a rogue fixer who broke a taboo. Binah and Zena are dispatched by the Head to surpress you once and for all (Original)

2: Captured and 'interrogated' by the two Arbiters. (Smut)

3: You somehow have crazy game and the next morning, wake up with 2 Arbiters in your bed. (Smut/fluff)

4: Tea after being rescued by Binah and Zena (Fluff)

5: Free intro!

[TW: Noncon, murder]
creator: Path4474!
